Formerly: EDCI734.

TLPL744 Research Centering Multilingual Learners: Sociocultural Approaches to Applied Linguistics in Education (3 Credits)

Critically examine research relevant to multilingual students, bilingual education, and theories of second language acquisition and multilingual development. Students will apply sociocultural perspectives to understand educational contexts and practices that can lead to greater educational equity for culturally and linguistically diverse students.
